revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: rm excess dashes. Only need one per line
revision.text:
[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
tags by default which can specify which section to edit on a page, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Vedit}} — plain-style edit link which edit with the [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]], applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces Templates with view, talk and edit links: * {{tl|Navbar}} — navigation bar with configurable caption and view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|View}} — navbar-style view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|VTE}} & {{tl|V}} — navbar-style V·T·E links (i.e. view·talk·edit links in short forms), specifically for templates only {{Documentation}}

[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
tags by default which can specify which section to edit on a page, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Vedit}} — plain-style edit link which edit with the [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]], applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces Templates with view, talk and edit links: * {{tl|Navbar}} — navigation bar with configurable caption and view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|View}} — navbar-style view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|VTE}} & {{tl|V}} — navbar-style V·T·E links (i.e. view·talk·edit links in short forms), specifically for templates only {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing programmatically made stuff
revision.text:
[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
tags by default which can specify which section to edit on a page, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Vedit}} — plain-style edit link which edit with the [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]], applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces Templates with view, talk and edit links: * {{tl|Navbar}} — navigation bar with configurable caption and view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|View}} — navbar-style view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|VTE}} & {{tl|V}} — navbar-style V·T·E links (i.e. view·talk·edit links in short forms), specifically for templates only {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
tags by default which can specify which section to edit on a page, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Vedit}} — plain-style edit link which edit with the [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]], applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces Templates with view, talk and edit links: * {{tl|Navbar}} — navigation bar with configurable caption and view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|View}} — navbar-style view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|VTE}} & {{tl|V}} — navbar-style V·T·E links (i.e. view·talk·edit links in short forms), specifically for templates only {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
tags by default which can specify which section to edit on a page, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Vedit}} — plain-style edit link which edit with the [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor]], applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces Templates with view, talk and edit links: * {{tl|Navbar}} — navigation bar with configurable caption and view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|View}} — navbar-style view·talk·edit links, specifically for templates only * {{tl|VTE}} & {{tl|V}} — navbar-style V·T·E links (i.e. view·talk·edit links in short forms), specifically for templates only {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Edit_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]

[{{view|Template:Edit templates|edit}}] Compare different edit templates:
* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by

* {{tl|Ed}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Ed right}} — plain-style edit link surrounded by tags and aligned to right of page, specifically for templates only * {{tl|Edit}} — plain-style edit link, applicable to all Wikipedia namespaces * {{tl|Edit section}} — edit link surrounded by
